# Dependency Map Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# Dependency Map — <Project or Workstream>

## Summary

## Critical dependencies

| Dependency | Type | Needed from | Needed by | Impact if late | Owner | Due / trigger | Next action |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|  | Team / System / Decision / Data / Environment / Release / Vendor / Approval |  |  |  |  |  |  |

## Dependency flow

- Upstream:
- Internal coordination:
- Downstream:

## Owner/date gaps

## Escalations or decisions needed

## Assumptions / missing inputs
```
